summary: Lead fixed the qa_reviewer REQUEST_CHANGES for M5 Exit Gate by reconciling stale top-level continuation and goal-mode ledger fields. GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION now records M5_EXIT_GATE_REVIEW, origin_main and last_main_commit at 4919f8bc48fa3b7e13ea69ebd8483b1e70a0f313, current task M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 in REVIEW, and last_closed_task M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001. goal-mode-state now records last_main_commit and the manual decision sub-ledger at 4919f8bc48fa3b7e13ea69ebd8483b1e70a0f313, with manual decision status CLOSED. M5 remains not passed and M6 remains not started.

tests_run.result: Verified goal-mode last_main_commit, continuation origin_main/last_main_commit, top-level continuation status/current task/last_closed_task, manual decision last_main_commit, manual decision status CLOSED, M5 Exit REVIEW, m5_gate_result null, and m6_started false.
No whitespace errors after the ledger reconciliation.

decisions: Do not change the Gate recommendation: M5_GATE remains recommended as PASS_WITH_LIMITS pending reviewer acceptance.
Do not start M6; m6_started remains false and current_milestone remains M5.
Do not change product/runtime/content code; this fix is limited to process and state-ledger reconciliation.
risks: QA must re-review the fixed state ledgers before lead can accept M5 Exit Gate.
requested_action: Re-review the fixed state ledgers and Gate evidence. ACCEPT only if the previously reported stale continuation and goal-mode fields are resolved and no new blocker is introduced.
